title: Lex's Linens Premium Blue Linen Union Glass Cloths – Pack of 4 | 100% Natural Cotton & Linen Blend | Lint-Free, Streak-Free Finish | Ideal for Polishing Glassware, Mirrors & Windows
features: Professional-Grade Lint-Free Finish Achieve a sparkling, streak-free shine on glassware, mirrors, and windows with our premium linen union cloths—trusted by professionals for their superior polishing capabilities.
Durable Cotton-Linen Blend Crafted from a robust mix of natural cotton and linen, these cloths offer enhanced absorbency and longevity, making them a sustainable choice for daily cleaning tasks.
Generous Size for Versatile Use Each cloth measures 50 x 75 cm, providing ample coverage for various cleaning needs, from kitchen surfaces to delicate glass items.
Machine Washable & Reusable Designed for convenience, our cloths are easy to clean and maintain their quality wash after wash, reducing the need for disposable alternatives.
Value Pack of 4 This economical set ensures you always have a fresh cloth on hand, whether for home use or professional settings like bars and restaurants.
description: Elevate your cleaning routine with Lex's Linens Premium Blue Linen Union Glass Cloths. This pack of four high-quality cloths combines the natural strength of cotton with the superior polishing properties of linen, delivering a lint-free, streak-free finish every time. Ideal for a variety of applications, these cloths are perfect for: Polishing glassware to a brilliant shine Cleaning mirrors and windows without streaks Wiping down kitchen surfaces and appliances Professional use in hospitality settings Measuring 50 x 75 cm, each cloth offers generous coverage, making your cleaning tasks more efficient. The durable cotton-linen blend ensures long-lasting performance, and their machine-washable nature means they're ready to use again and again. Choose Lex's Linens for a blend of quality, durability, and eco-friendly cleaning solutions.
